use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING MILD TO MODERATE PAIN IN ADULTS
METHOD OF TREATING MODERATE TO SEVERE PAIN IN ADULTS AS AN ADJUNCT TO OPIOID ANALGESICS

indications.text:
COMBOGESIC IV is indicated in adults where an intravenous route of administration is considered clinically
necessary for:
• the relief of mild to moderate pain
• the management of moderate to severe pain as an adjunct to opioid analgesics
Limitations of Use
COMBOGESIC IV is indicated for short-term ...
